name: PII Named Entity Recognition Policy
description: On-device NER-based PII detection for people, locations, organisations, and miscellaneous entities. All rules require an active ONNX model (bert-base-ner or distilbert-ner — download in Settings). Rules silently no-op without a model, so this policy is safe to activate at any time.

rules.notes: Person name detection via NER — GDPR Art. 4 direct personal identifier
Location name detection via NER — PII when combined with other identifiers
Organisation name detection via NER — contextual, lower standalone risk
Miscellaneous named entities via NER — nationalities, events, awards; partial NRP overlap
Pattern fallback for NER misses in labeled form fields (Name: FirstLast)
Pronoun + name references (e.g. 'his name is John') — below labeled_field_name, above ner.person_name

metadata.compliance_scope: Named entity PII detection via on-device AI models
